name: ConfirmButton

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: Button content (the visible label or icon).

parameters.name: Title
parameters.description: Title shown at the top of the confirm dialog. Defaults to the AlertDialog default ("Are you sure?").

parameters.name: Description
parameters.description: Optional descriptive body text under the title.

parameters.name: ConfirmText
parameters.description: Label for the confirm action button. Defaults to "Continue".

parameters.name: CancelText
parameters.description: Label for the cancel action button. Defaults to "Cancel".

parameters.name: IsDestructive
parameters.description: When true, the confirm button is styled as destructive (red) — for delete / remove / discard actions.

parameters.name: OnConfirm
parameters.description: Fires after the user confirms. Does NOT fire on cancel — listen to OnCancel for that path if needed.

parameters.name: OnCancel
parameters.description: Fires when the user cancels (or closes the dialog without confirming). Optional — most consumers only care about OnConfirm.

parameters.name: Variant
parameters.description: Visual variant of the trigger button. Defaults to Default; commonly set to Destructive for delete actions so the button itself is red even before the dialog opens.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: Disables the trigger button, preventing the confirm dialog from opening.

parameters.name: IsLoading
parameters.description: Shows the trigger button's loading state (spinner, disabled interaction) while the caller has a pending operation in flight — forwarded to Button.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the trigger button.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the trigger button.

events.name: OnConfirm
events.description: Fires after the user confirms. Does NOT fire on cancel — listen to OnCancel for that path if needed.

events.name: OnCancel
events.description: Fires when the user cancels (or closes the dialog without confirming). Optional — most consumers only care about OnConfirm.

examples.title: Basic Confirm
examples.code:
<ConfirmButton Title="Save changes?"
               Description="Your edits will be applied immediately."
               OnConfirm="@HandleSave">
    Save
</ConfirmButton>

examples.title: Destructive Action
examples.code:
<ConfirmButton Title="Delete account?"
               Description="All your data will be permanently removed."
               ConfirmText="Yes, delete"
               CancelText="Keep account"
               IsDestructive="true"
               Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Destructive"
               OnConfirm="@HandleDelete"
               OnCancel="@HandleCancel">
    Delete Account
</ConfirmButton>

examples.title: Variants and Sizes
examples.code:
<ConfirmButton Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Secondary" Title="Archive project?" ConfirmText="Archive" OnConfirm="@HandleArchive">Archive</ConfirmButton>
<ConfirmButton Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline" Size="Button.ButtonSize.Sm" Title="Reset form?" OnConfirm="@HandleReset">Reset</ConfirmButton>
<ConfirmButton Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Destructive" Size="Button.ButtonSize.Lg" Title="Remove member?" IsDestructive="true" OnConfirm="@HandleRemove">Remove</ConfirmButton>

slots.name: ChildContent
slots.description: Button content (the visible label or icon).

mdSummary:
# ConfirmButton

Confirm Button component.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Forms
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/confirm-button

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| ConfirmButton | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Button content (the visible label or icon). |
| ConfirmButton | Title | `string?` | `` | Title shown at the top of the confirm dialog. Defaults to the AlertDialog default ("Are you sure?"). |
| ConfirmButton | Description | `string?` | `` | Optional descriptive body text under the title. |
| ConfirmButton | ConfirmText | `string?` | `` | Label for the confirm action button. Defaults to "Continue". |
| ConfirmButton | CancelText | `string?` | `` | Label for the cancel action button. Defaults to "Cancel". |
| ConfirmButton | IsDestructive | `bool` | `false` | When true, the confirm button is styled as destructive (red) — for delete / remove / discard actions. |
| ConfirmButton | OnConfirm | `EventCallback` | `` | Fires after the user confirms. Does NOT fire on cancel — listen to OnCancel for that path if needed. |
| ConfirmButton | OnCancel | `EventCallback` | `` | Fires when the user cancels (or closes the dialog without confirming). Optional — most consumers only care about OnConfirm. |
| ConfirmButton | Variant | `Button.ButtonVariant` | `Button.ButtonVariant.Default` | Visual variant of the trigger button. Defaults to Default; commonly set to Destructive for delete actions so the button itself is red even before the dialog opens. |
| ConfirmButton | Size | `Button.ButtonSize` | `Button.ButtonSize.Default` | Size of the trigger button. |
| ConfirmButton | Disabled | `bool` | `false` | Disables the trigger button, preventing the confirm dialog from opening. |
| ConfirmButton | IsLoading | `bool` | `false` | Shows the trigger button's loading state (spinner, disabled interaction) while the caller has a pending operation in flight — forwarded to Button. |
| ConfirmButton | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the trigger button. |
| ConfirmButton | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary\<string, object\>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes splatted onto the trigger button. |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (ConfirmButton) — Button content (the visible label or icon).

## Events
- `OnConfirm` (`EventCallback`) — Fires after the user confirms. Does NOT fire on cancel — listen to OnCancel for that path if needed.
- `OnCancel` (`EventCallback`) — Fires when the user cancels (or closes the dialog without confirming). Optional — most consumers only care about OnConfirm.

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- `IOverlayService` (Lumeo.Services)
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<ConfirmButton />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-foreground`

## Files
- `UI/ConfirmButton/ConfirmButton.razor`
